title: Crisp Roasted Slovakian Yogurt Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring roasted dumplings made with full fat yogurt, wrapped in leaves and steamed to perfection, this recipe is diabetic-friendly and perfect for a romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: leaf wraps
ingredients.notes: such as collard green or grape leaves

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, egg, salt, and pepper.
Add the yogurt to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Wrap each ball in a leaf wrap, making sure to seal the edges tightly.
Place the wrapped dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the dumplings and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the dumplings from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
